issue_title: fix: prevent NotFoundError when drag-dropping large folders
issue_body_preview:
## Summary

- Drag-dropping a folder with 500+ files fails with `NotFoundError` because the browser discards `FileSystemEntry` references while earlier files are still uploading sequentially
- Resolve all directory entries and materialize `File` handles upfront before starting any uploads, so the sl
test_description_zh: 在 Twake Drive 主界面中，准备一个包含 500 个以上文件的文件夹，将该文件夹从操作系统文件管理器拖拽到 Twake Drive 的上传区域，观察上传过程和结果。
expected_result_zh: 拖拽包含大量文件（500+）的文件夹到上传区域后，所有文件应能正常开始上传并最终全部上传成功，不应出现 NotFoundError 错误提示，上传过程不会中断或部分文件丢失。
